transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my ceiling fan keeps tripping the breaker and it's getting bad! This is Jennifer Wu at 314 Birch Lane. Dispatcher: Okay Jennifer, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 314 Birch Lane right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: ceiling fan keeps tripping the breaker
